samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="size" value="4">Size parameter for the multiplier.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="ext_mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Extend multiplicand to 8 bits.</assign>
        <assign id="ext_mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Extend multiplier to 8 bits.</assign>
        <assign id="partial_product[0]" width_description="[7:0]">Partial product for bit 0.</assign>
        <assign id="partial_product[1]" width_description="[7:0]">Partial product for bit 1.</assign>
        <assign id="partial_product[2]" width_description="[7:0]">Partial product for bit 2.</assign>
        <assign id="partial_product[3]" width_description="[7:0]">Partial product for bit 3.</assign>
        <assign id="reg_sum[0]" width_description="[7:0]">Register for storing sum for bit 0.</assign>
        <assign id="reg_sum[1]" width_description="[7:0]">Register for storing sum for bit 1.</assign>
        <assign id="reg_sum[2]" width_description="[7:0]">Register for storing sum for bit 2.</assign>
        <assign id="reg_sum[3]" width_description="[7:0]">Register for storing sum for bit 3.</assign>
        <assign id="product" width_description="[7:0]">Final product.</assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Extend inputs to fit the size
        assign ext_mul_a = {4'b0, mul_a};
        assign ext_mul_b = {4'b0, mul_b};
        
        // Generate partial products based on the multiplier's bits
        genvar i;
        generate
            for (i = 0; i < size; i = i + 1) begin : pp_gen
                if (i == 0) begin
                    assign partial_product[i] = (mul_b[i]) ? ext_mul_a << i : 'd0;
                end else begin
                    assign partial_product[i] = (mul_b[i]) ? ext_mul_a << i : 'd0;
                end
            end
        endgenerate
        
        // Registering the sums of partial products
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                reg_sum[0] <= 8'd0;
                reg_sum[1] <= 8'd0;
                reg_sum[2] <= 8'd0;
                reg_sum[3] <= 8'd0;
            end else begin
                reg_sum[0] <= partial_product[0];
                reg_sum[1] <= reg_sum[0] + partial_product[1];
                reg_sum[2] <= reg_sum[1] + partial_product[2];
                reg_sum[3] <= reg_sum[2] + partial_product[3];
            end
        end
        
        // Final product calculation
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                product <= 8'd0;
            end else begin
                product <= reg_sum[3];
            end
        end
        
        // Assign final product to output
        assign mul_out = product;
    </implementation>
</module>
